migration.mergeLockedHint: Library locked during merge. Do not close FRKB.
migration.mergeCuratedLockedHint: Library locked during merge. Do not close FRKB.

mergeDialog.title: Merge FRKB Libraries
mergeDialog.intro: Merge another FRKB library into the current one.
mergeDialog.contents: Playlists, tracks, analysis/fingerprints, SET, Mixtape, and related resources. Recycle Bin is skipped.
mergeDialog.safety: Integrity and disk space are checked first; the source library is not modified. The current library is locked during merge and can recover if interrupted.
mergeDialog.playlist: Both are kept; the source playlist gets a “(from …)” suffix.
mergeDialog.sourceInstruction: Select FRKB.database.frkbdb in the source library.
mergeDialog.checkingSource: Checking source structure, database, and disk space…

invalid-selection.title: Choose the FRKB database file
invalid-selection.description: Select FRKB.database.frkbdb in the source library root.

nested-library.title: Library paths cannot nest
nested-library.description: Move the source library outside the current library path.

version-incompatible.title: Source library is too old
version-incompatible.description: Update FRKB, open the source library once, then merge.

unregistered-data.title: Unregistered source data
unregistered-data.description: Likely a new feature or dev build; merge is blocked. See log.txt.

invalid-library.title: Source cannot be merged safely
invalid-library.description: Use a complete, unmodified FRKB library, or open it in FRKB first.

empty-curated-library.title: Source curated library is empty
empty-curated-library.description: No folders or playlists to import.

insufficient-space.title: Not enough disk space
insufficient-space.description: Free space on the current library disk, then try again. Nothing was changed.

space-unavailable.title: Cannot check disk space
space-unavailable.description: Ensure the current library disk is accessible, then choose again.

current-library.title: Current library not ready
current-library.description: Open the current library normally and finish any required upgrade.

unavailable.title: Source library unavailable
unavailable.description: Choose again. If it continues, confirm both libraries open in FRKB.

mergeDialog.copyDescription: Copy into the current library; leave the source unchanged.
mergeDialog.deleteDescription: Clean up the source only after a successful save. Cleanup failure does not undo the merge.
mergeDialog.sourceDeleteWarning: Merge succeeded, but source cleanup did not finish.
mergeDialog.busyCancellableLead: These tasks are running and can be cancelled (queued-only work is cleared automatically):
mergeDialog.busyCancelFailed: Could not stop analysis. Try again in a moment.

busyReasons.key-analysis: Track analysis (key / BPM / grid / energy / structure / waveform)

mergeCuratedDialog.title: Merge Curated Library
mergeCuratedDialog.intro: Import the curated library from another FRKB library into the current one.
mergeCuratedDialog.contents: Only curated folders, playlists, audio, and track analysis/fingerprints. Filter, SET, Mixtape, Recording, Recycle Bin, and curated artists are skipped.
mergeCuratedDialog.safety: Integrity and disk space are checked first; the source library is not modified. The current library is locked during merge and can recover if interrupted.
mergeCuratedDialog.playlist: Same-name folders merge. For same-name playlists, choose keep both or merge into existing in setup.
mergeCuratedDialog.sourceInstruction: Select FRKB.database.frkbdb in the source library.
mergeCuratedDialog.checkingSource: Checking curated structure, database, and disk space…
mergeCuratedDialog.duplicateMergeIntoDescription: Tracks go into the current playlist; colliding files get a suffix.

invalid-selection.title: Choose the FRKB database file
invalid-selection.description: Select FRKB.database.frkbdb in the source library root.

nested-library.title: Library paths cannot nest
nested-library.description: Move the source library outside the current library path.

version-incompatible.title: Source library is too old
version-incompatible.description: Update FRKB, open the source library once, then merge.

unregistered-data.title: Unregistered source data
unregistered-data.description: Likely a new feature or dev build; merge is blocked. See log.txt.

invalid-library.title: Source cannot be merged safely
invalid-library.description: Use a complete, unmodified FRKB library, or open it in FRKB first.

empty-curated-library.title: Source curated library is empty
empty-curated-library.description: No folders or playlists to import.

insufficient-space.title: Not enough disk space
insufficient-space.description: Free space on the current library disk, then try again. Nothing was changed.

space-unavailable.title: Cannot check disk space
space-unavailable.description: Ensure the current library disk is accessible, then choose again.

current-library.title: Current library not ready
current-library.description: Open the current library normally and finish any required upgrade.

unavailable.title: Source library unavailable
unavailable.description: Choose again. If it continues, confirm both libraries open in FRKB.

mergeCuratedDialog.copyDescription: Copy into the current library; leave the source unchanged.
mergeCuratedDialog.deleteDescription: Clear the source curated tree only after a successful save. Cleanup failure does not undo the merge.
mergeCuratedDialog.sourceDeleteWarning: Merge succeeded, but source curated cleanup did not finish.
mergeCuratedDialog.busyCancellableLead: These tasks are running and can be cancelled (queued-only work is cleared automatically):
mergeCuratedDialog.busyCancelFailed: Could not stop analysis. Try again in a moment.

busyReasons.key-analysis: Track analysis (key / BPM / grid / energy / structure / waveform)

mergeDescription.preflight: Checking structure, consistency, and disk space.
mergeDescription.staging: Writing to staging first; not committed yet.
mergeDescription.deleting-source: Merge succeeded; cleaning the source library.

mergeCuratedDescription.preflight: Checking curated structure and disk space.
mergeCuratedDescription.staging: Writing to staging first; not committed yet.
mergeCuratedDescription.committing: Saving curated playlists and analysis data.
mergeCuratedDescription.deleting-source: Merge succeeded; clearing source curated library.

migration.legacyInProgress: Previous upgrade didn't finish. It will run again.
migration.legacyRequired: Legacy library detected. Upgrade required to continue.
migration.legacyActions: The upgrade will reorganize library data. The upgraded library won't work with older FRKB versions. Please don't open it with older versions. Large libraries may take longer. Please don't force quit.
